strands.strand: Financial capability and economic wellbeing for adulthood
strands.gapNote: No app on credit, debt, tax, tenancy or adult budgeting at KS5.

suggestedApps.title: Adulting Finance Simulator
suggestedApps.concept: Class runs a young adult's finances across a year (rent, payslips, credit, unexpected bills), seeing how decisions build or erode security.

strands.strand: Personal safety, online life and informed citizenship
strands.gapNote: No KS5 app on adult online risks (scams, misinformation, data), personal safety or rights and responsibilities.

suggestedApps.title: Spot the Scam
suggestedApps.concept: Live stream of adult-world messages (phishing, fraud, fake news) the class judges and reports, building real-world digital resilience.

summary.headline: Behaviour and pastoral self-regulation/conflict tools are strong (and best fit KS2-KS3), but the statutory RSHE/Health Education core - families, being safe, puberty and physical health, consent and sexual health, substances, and online media literacy - is largely uncovered, especially at EYFS/KS1 and KS4/KS5.

subject: CPD & Staff Tools
sourceNotes: WeST-defined teacher professional development framework. No statutory National Curriculum exists for teacher CPD; this framework is grounded in the DfE Core Content Framework (ITT, 2019), the Early Career Framework (2019, updated 2024 as the ITTECF), and National Professional Qualification content (Leading Teaching, Leading Behaviour and Culture, Leading Curriculum and Assessment frameworks). Organised as 8 broad practice domains, each holding broad strands representing specific professional competencies. Coverage decisions cross-referenced against the 12 existing cpd-*.html apps in /apps. UK English and UK terminology throughout.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Establishing and maintaining classroom routines
strands.gapNote: No app supports designing, rehearsing or auditing the day-to-day routines (entry, transitions, materials) that underpin a calm classroom.

suggestedApps.title: Routine Designer and Rehearsal Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Build step-by-step routines (entry, transition, exit) with rehearsal scripts and a checklist for consistent reinforcement.

suggestedApps.title: Transition Time Tracker
suggestedApps.concept: Time and log classroom transitions to surface where lost learning time accumulates and set improvement targets.

strands.strand: Seating, grouping and learning environment
High expectations and a positive classroom culture
strands.gapNote: Nothing helps teachers articulate, communicate and track the visible behaviours that signal consistently high expectations.

suggestedApps.title: Expectations and Norms Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Co-construct and display classroom norms with positively framed exemplars and a self-audit of teacher language.

suggestedApps.title: Recognition and Reinforcement Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Plan proportionate praise and reinforcement strategies, balancing acknowledgement of effort with academic challenge.

strands.strand: Responding to and de-escalating low-level disruption
strands.gapNote: No tool rehearses graduated, least-intrusive responses or helps reflect on consistency of sanctions.

suggestedApps.title: Least-Intrusive Response Rehearser
suggestedApps.concept: Scenario-based practice of a stepped response ladder, from non-verbal cues to formal consequence, with reflective prompts.

suggestedApps.title: Behaviour Log and Pattern Spotter
suggestedApps.concept: Record incidents and surface time-of-day, seating or trigger patterns to inform proactive adjustments.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Clear, structured explanation of new content
strands.gapNote: No app helps teachers sequence, script or sense-check the clarity of an explanation before teaching it.

suggestedApps.title: Explanation Sequencer
suggestedApps.concept: Break new content into a logical sequence of small steps with worked checks for ambiguity and prior-knowledge dependencies.

suggestedApps.title: Analogy and Example Bank Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Curate concrete examples, non-examples and analogies for a concept, flagging common misconceptions to pre-empt.

strands.strand: Worked examples and live modelling
strands.gapNote: Nothing supports planning a worked example or narrated 'I do' that makes expert thinking visible.

suggestedApps.title: Worked Example Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Design faded worked examples (full model to completion problem) with a think-aloud script for the teacher narration.

strands.strand: Managing cognitive load in instruction
Using clear models, exemplars and success criteria
strands.gapNote: Scaffolding planner touches on supports but does not help build annotated WAGOLL exemplars or success criteria.

suggestedApps.title: Exemplar and Success Criteria Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Annotate a 'what a good one looks like' model against co-created success criteria pupils can self-assess against.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Designing effective questions across cognitive demand
Equitable distribution of questioning
Wait time and thinking time
Dialogic talk and structured classroom discussion
strands.gapNote: No app supports planning oracy protocols, talk roles or whole-class discussion structures.

suggestedApps.title: Oracy and Talk Protocol Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Plan structured discussion formats (think-pair-share, talk roles, sentence stems) with an oracy progression for the topic.

suggestedApps.title: Cold Call and Probing Sequence Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Design a no-hands cold-call sequence with planned probing follow-ups to stretch and check responses.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Retrieval practice and low-stakes quizzing
Spaced and interleaved practice scheduling
strands.gapNote: Quiz generator produces questions but nothing schedules spacing or interleaving across a unit or term.

suggestedApps.title: Spacing and Interleaving Scheduler
suggestedApps.concept: Plot when each topic is revisited across a scheme so retrieval is distributed and interleaved rather than blocked.

strands.strand: Deliberate and guided practice
strands.gapNote: Scaffolding planner addresses support but not the design of independent practice tasks at the right difficulty.

suggestedApps.title: Practice Task Designer
suggestedApps.concept: Build sets of practice items that move from guided to independent, calibrating difficulty and minimal effective help.

strands.strand: Pacing and use of lesson time
Securing prior knowledge before new learning
strands.gapNote: No tool helps map and check the prerequisite knowledge a lesson assumes pupils already hold.

suggestedApps.title: Prerequisite Knowledge Mapper
suggestedApps.concept: Identify the prior knowledge a new topic depends on and generate a quick diagnostic to confirm it is secure.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Formative assessment and checking for understanding
Giving high-quality written and verbal feedback
Efficient and sustainable marking practice
strands.gapNote: Feedback builder helps phrase feedback but does not address whole-class feedback or workload-efficient marking models.

suggestedApps.title: Whole-Class Feedback Sheet Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Turn marking observations into a single whole-class feedback sheet with common errors, model answers and next steps.

strands.strand: Designing valid assessments and using assessment data
strands.gapNote: Nothing supports designing assessments aligned to the curriculum or analysing question-level performance.

suggestedApps.title: Assessment Blueprint Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Map assessment items to curriculum objectives and cognitive demand to check validity and coverage before sitting.

suggestedApps.title: Question-Level Analysis Tool
suggestedApps.concept: Enter pupil responses by question to surface gaps and drive targeted reteaching and intervention.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Adapting teaching for the range of needs in the room
Scaffolding and fading support
Supporting pupils with SEND
strands.gapNote: Differentiation planner is generic; nothing translates EHCP or SEND-register needs into specific classroom adaptations.

suggestedApps.title: SEND Classroom Adaptation Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Convert a pupil's identified needs into concrete, low-workload teaching adaptations using the graduated approach.

strands.strand: High-quality teaching for disadvantaged and EAL pupils
strands.gapNote: No app addresses targeted strategies for closing gaps for disadvantaged or EAL learners.

suggestedApps.title: Vocabulary and EAL Support Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Plan tiered vocabulary teaching and language scaffolds for a lesson to support EAL and disadvantaged pupils.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Sequencing the curriculum and building schemes of learning
strands.gapNote: No tool supports sequencing concepts across a unit or year so knowledge builds coherently.

suggestedApps.title: Curriculum Sequencer
suggestedApps.concept: Order concepts across a scheme with explicit links to prior and future learning and identified threshold concepts.

strands.strand: Lesson and unit planning
strands.gapNote: Lesson timer addresses pacing only; there is no structured lesson or unit planning template grounded in the framework.

suggestedApps.title: Evidence-Informed Lesson Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Build a lesson around recap, instruction, practice and check, prompting for cognitive-science-aligned choices at each phase.

strands.strand: Subject and pedagogical content knowledge
strands.gapNote: Nothing helps teachers audit subject knowledge or anticipate subject-specific misconceptions.

suggestedApps.title: Misconception Anticipation Bank
suggestedApps.concept: Build a subject- and topic-specific bank of common pupil misconceptions with diagnostic questions and corrective moves.

strands.strand: Reading, vocabulary and literacy across the curriculum
strands.gapNote: No app supports planning disciplinary literacy, tier-two vocabulary or reading strategies within subjects.

suggestedApps.title: Disciplinary Literacy Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Plan subject-specific reading, vocabulary and writing demands for a unit with explicit teaching strategies.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Observation, feedback and instructional coaching
Reflective practice and professional development planning
strands.gapNote: No tool helps a teacher set, track and review personal development goals across an appraisal cycle.

suggestedApps.title: CPD Goal and Reflection Journal
suggestedApps.concept: Set development goals against the framework, log deliberate practice and reflect on impact over time.

strands.strand: Engaging with educational research and evidence
strands.gapNote: Nothing curates or helps teachers interrogate the evidence base (EEF, cognitive science) for their practice.

suggestedApps.title: Evidence Summary Explorer
suggestedApps.concept: Browse plain-English summaries of key evidence (EEF strands, cognitive science) with classroom implications and confidence ratings.

strands.strand: Wellbeing, workload and professional conduct
strands.gapNote: No app supports staff wellbeing, workload self-audit or reflection against professional standards.

suggestedApps.title: Workload Self-Audit Tool
suggestedApps.concept: Audit where time goes against high-impact activity and identify workload reductions aligned to trust policy.

summary.headline: The framework's instructional core (questioning, retrieval, feedback) is well served, but the entire Planning and Curriculum domain plus behaviour routines and professional growth are almost wholly unsupported.

subject: Data & Analytics
sourceNotes: WeST-defined professional competency framework for senior and middle leaders. No statutory National Curriculum exists for school data literacy and analytics; this framework is grounded in DfE accountability measures (Progress 8, Attainment 8, EBacc), the IDSR and Analyse School Performance (ASP), DfE attendance and suspension/exclusion data collections, and assessment/standards practice (GCSE grade boundaries, prior-attainment banding, transition matrices). Coverage decided by matching the 11 existing data apps in curriculum-expert-web/apps. 7 domains, 36 strands.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Calculating and interpreting Progress 8
Attainment 8 composition and the three buckets (English, maths, EBacc, open)
strands.gapNote: P8 calculator implies A8 slots but no dedicated bucket-weighting and 10-slot fill explorer.

suggestedApps.title: Attainment 8 Bucket Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Drag grades into the English (double), maths (double), EBacc and open buckets and watch A8 and the 10-slot fill recalculate live.

strands.strand: Value Added and estimate-vs-actual analysis
EBacc entry and average point score (APS)
strands.gapNote: No app handles EBacc entry rate, EBacc APS or the EBacc 9-1 strong/standard pass thresholds.

suggestedApps.title: EBacc Entry and APS Dashboard
suggestedApps.concept: Model EBacc entry rate and average point score across the five pillars, flagging pupils one subject short of qualifying.

strands.strand: Basics measures: English and maths 9-5 and 9-4 pass rates
strands.gapNote: No app isolates the headline Basics (strong/standard) pass measures separately from P8/A8.

suggestedApps.title: Basics Pass-Rate Tracker
suggestedApps.concept: Show 9-4 and 9-5 English-and-maths pass rates with disadvantage and SEND splits against national benchmarks.

strands.strand: Prior-attainment banding (low, middle, high) of measures
strands.gapNote: Value Added uses prior attainment as the x-axis but there is no tool to split headline measures by KS2 prior-attainment band.

suggestedApps.title: Prior-Attainment Band Splitter
suggestedApps.concept: Break P8, A8 and Basics by low, middle and high KS2 prior-attainment bands to expose where progress is strongest.

strands.strand: Benchmarking against national, LA and similar-schools averages
strands.gapNote: No app contextualises a school's measures against national, local-authority or statistical-neighbour benchmarks.

suggestedApps.title: National Benchmark Overlay
suggestedApps.concept: Plot the school's headline measures against national, LA and similar-school averages with confidence intervals.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Disadvantaged vs non-disadvantaged attainment gap
Demographic performance breakdown (gender, SEND, EAL, ethnicity)
Pupil Premium spend, strategy and impact alignment
strands.gapNote: No app links Pupil Premium funding tiers (teaching, targeted, wider) to measured outcomes.

suggestedApps.title: Pupil Premium Strategy Impact Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Map PP spend across the EEF three-tier model and track each strand against the disadvantaged outcome it targets.

strands.strand: Intersectional disadvantage (multiple overlapping characteristics)
strands.gapNote: Demographic breakdown shows single characteristics but not the compounding effect of overlapping ones.

suggestedApps.title: Intersectional Gap Explorer
suggestedApps.concept: Filter by combined characteristics (e.g. disadvantaged SEND boys) to surface compound gaps masked by single-factor views.

strands.strand: Closing-the-gap trajectory over time
strands.gapNote: Gap visualiser is largely point-in-time; no multi-year narrowing/widening trend view.

suggestedApps.title: Gap Trajectory Trendline
suggestedApps.concept: Chart the disadvantage gap across three to five years with projection of when parity would be reached at current rate.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Attendance pattern and trend analysis
Persistent and severe absence identification
strands.gapNote: Patterns app shows attendance but no explicit PA (under 90%) and SA (under 50%) cohort flagging against thresholds.

suggestedApps.title: Persistent Absence Early-Warning Board
suggestedApps.concept: Flag pupils crossing the 90% and 50% thresholds with sessions-needed-to-recover and RAG escalation.

strands.strand: Authorised vs unauthorised absence and code analysis
strands.gapNote: No app breaks absence down by DfE attendance code (I, M, O, U etc).

suggestedApps.title: Attendance Code Breakdown
suggestedApps.concept: Decompose absence by statutory code to separate illness, holiday and unauthorised patterns by group.

strands.strand: Suspensions and permanent exclusions analysis
strands.gapNote: No app handles suspension days, repeat suspensions or permanent exclusion rates by characteristic.

suggestedApps.title: Suspensions and Exclusions Monitor
suggestedApps.concept: Track suspension episodes, lost days and PEX rates with disproportionality flags for disadvantaged and SEND pupils.

strands.strand: Behaviour, sanctions and on-call data analysis
strands.gapNote: No app analyses internal behaviour points, removals or on-call referrals.

suggestedApps.title: Behaviour Referral Analyser
suggestedApps.concept: Surface hotspots by time, subject, year group and pupil for behaviour points and removal-room referrals.

strands.strand: Attendance-to-attainment correlation
strands.gapNote: No app links attendance bands to outcome measures.

suggestedApps.title: Attendance-Attainment Scatter
suggestedApps.concept: Plot each pupil's attendance against P8 to quantify the cost of absence on progress.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Cohort tracking across data drops
Flight paths and target-setting from prior attainment
Transition matrices (KS2 to KS4 progress probabilities)
On-track vs off-track aggregation and forecasting
strands.gapNote: Flight Path Tracker shows individual trajectories but no whole-cohort forecast of projected headline measures.

suggestedApps.title: Cohort Outcome Forecaster
suggestedApps.concept: Aggregate current working-at grades into a projected P8/A8 with optimistic and cautious scenario bands.

strands.strand: Subject-level performance comparison within a cohort
Residuals: subject vs pupil's own average
strands.gapNote: No app computes per-subject residuals against each pupil's mean grade to find under/over-performing subjects.

suggestedApps.title: Subject Residual Heatmap
suggestedApps.concept: Show each subject's grade relative to the pupil's own average to expose departmental strengths and concerns.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: GCSE grade boundary interpretation and movement
Comparable outcomes and statistical equating awareness
strands.gapNote: Boundary explorer shows mark thresholds but not the comparable-outcomes principle that drives year-on-year shifts.

suggestedApps.title: Comparable Outcomes Explainer
suggestedApps.concept: Interactive model of how prior-attainment-anchored standard-setting moves boundaries even when papers vary in difficulty.

strands.strand: Standardisation and moderation of internal assessment
strands.gapNote: No app supports internal marking standardisation or moderation reliability checks.

suggestedApps.title: Moderation Reliability Checker
suggestedApps.concept: Compare markers' scores on common scripts and flag drift, leniency and inconsistency before data entry.

strands.strand: Grade distribution and question-level analysis (QLA)
strands.gapNote: No app provides question-level analysis of mock or assessment papers.

suggestedApps.title: Question-Level Analysis Grid
suggestedApps.concept: Heatmap performance by question and topic across a class to target reteaching precisely.

strands.strand: Grade-point conversion and scaling (9-1 to points)
strands.gapNote: Conversion is implicit in P8 and boundary tools but no standalone scale reference covering vocational point equivalents.

suggestedApps.title: Grade-to-Points Converter
suggestedApps.concept: Convert 9-1, legacy A*-G and approved vocational grades to DfE point scores for mixed-qualification cohorts.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Intervention tracking and impact measurement
Effect size and statistical significance of interventions
strands.gapNote: Tracker logs interventions but does not compute effect size or whether change exceeds noise.

suggestedApps.title: Intervention Effect-Size Calculator
suggestedApps.concept: Compute Cohen's d and confidence intervals on pre/post data to test whether an intervention genuinely worked.

strands.strand: Cost-effectiveness and resource allocation
strands.gapNote: No app weighs intervention cost against measured outcome gain.

suggestedApps.title: Intervention Cost-Benefit Planner
suggestedApps.concept: Rank interventions by cost per grade of progress using an EEF-style months-of-progress lens.

strands.strand: Distinguishing correlation from causation in school data
strands.gapNote: No app helps leaders avoid over-claiming causal impact from observational data.

suggestedApps.title: Correlation vs Causation Sandbox
suggestedApps.concept: Manipulate confounders and counterfactuals to show why a rise after an intervention is not proof it caused the rise.

keyStages.statutoryNote: Professional framework (WeST-defined, no statutory National Curriculum)

strands.strand: Navigating the IDSR and Analyse School Performance (ASP)
strands.gapNote: No app orientates leaders to IDSR/ASP layout, significance colouring and headline gauges.

suggestedApps.title: IDSR Walkthrough Simulator
suggestedApps.concept: Annotated interactive replica of an IDSR explaining quintiles, significance shading and what inspectors read first.

strands.strand: Statistical significance and confidence intervals in accountability data
strands.gapNote: No app explains why small cohorts produce wide confidence intervals and unstable measures.

suggestedApps.title: Confidence Interval Visualiser
suggestedApps.concept: Slide cohort size to show how P8 confidence intervals widen and when a result is statistically significant.

strands.strand: Governor and trust-board data reporting
strands.gapNote: No app produces a clear, jargon-controlled governance summary from headline data.

suggestedApps.title: Governor Data Summary Builder
suggestedApps.concept: Turn headline measures into a one-page RAG-rated board report with plain-English commentary prompts.

strands.strand: Data visualisation principles and avoiding misleading charts
strands.gapNote: No app teaches honest charting (truncated axes, dual axes, cherry-picked baselines).

suggestedApps.title: Honest Charts Lab
suggestedApps.concept: Toggle misleading-chart tricks on and off to train leaders to spot and avoid distortion in their own reporting.

strands.strand: Data protection, GDPR and ethical handling of pupil data
strands.gapNote: No app addresses lawful basis, minimisation and safeguarding when sharing pupil-level data.

suggestedApps.title: Pupil Data Ethics Checker
suggestedApps.concept: Scenario-based tool testing lawful basis, minimisation and anonymisation decisions before data is shared.

summary.headline: The framework's analytical core is well served, but the entire Reporting and Governance domain (IDSR/ASP navigation, statistical significance, board reporting, data ethics) is uncovered, the biggest gap for senior leaders accountable to inspectors and trustees.
